hooks.name: init-git-and-gitignore
hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (!(Test-Path .git)) { git init }; if (!(Test-Path .gitignore)) { Set-Content -Path .gitignore -Value '# Ignore everything by default`n*`n`n# Allow directories (required for recursive matching)`n!*/`n`n# Root-level essentials`n!.gitignore`n!GEMINI.md`n!README.md`n!CHANGELOG.md`n!LICENSE.md`n`n# Exclude sensitive data`n**/.git/`n**/node_modules/`n**/dist/`n**/build/`n**/*.log`n**/.env`n**/.DS_Store' }"
